identity.name: Book In Bar - Librairie et café

discovery.text: Verified for Cours Mirabeau: Book In Bar sits just off the boulevard and is exactly the kind of bookstore-café edge that helps explain why the promenade works — porous frontage, browsing, sitting, and intellectual life feeding back into the street.

narrative.summary: A one-block-off bookstore-café that reinforces Cours Mirabeau's strolling, reading, and terrace culture.

blocks.title: Why it teaches the street
blocks.body: Cours Mirabeau is not only about plane trees and facades; it works because adjoining rooms of city life keep the promenade textured. Book In Bar is a near-perfect supporting edge: books, coffee, long daytime hours, and a threshold that encourages lingering before or after a walk on the Cours.
